Site Name: TBD   Location: East of Gyala Hatchery site   Viability: High   Pros: Partially excavated previously, but long abandoned. Exposed rich deposits remain. Previous dig attempt(s) appear Luxon given the structural remains; possible salvage opportunities, though most appear to be corroded and/or irreparable. Jade readily accessible.   Risks: Local fauna remarkably aggressive. Surveyors report possible air-quality issues—typical air filtration equipment may be required. Rail access inconvenient/convoluted but plausible—perhaps this is positive if avoiding regulatory scrutiny is preferred?

Skiffs are a great way to get around the waters of Tyria. When anchored, they can be used as a platform to fish from.
Skiffs are locked until acquiring the Skiff Piloting Mastery track from the End of Dragons expansion.
Skiffs can be ridden by up to 5 players. The owner is the pilot, and up to 4 other party members or squadmates can join as passengers.

Skill combos are special attacks that trigger when a combo finisher skill is used in conjunction with a combo field skill. Skill descriptions will tell you if your skill creates a Combo Field or completes a combo. Use this skill on the combo field around the crystal to help your allies by triggering a healing wave combo.
Skill rating represents your personal skill relative to other players.
Skill Shot. Fire a bolt in the direction you are facing. Uses 1 ammunition charge.
Skill slot unlocked at pet evolution level %num1%.
Skill uses remaining with this conjured weapon.
Skill: Antiair Bolt—Fires a projectile that knocks enemies out of the air and immobilizes them. Dismounts enemies.
Skill: Healing Oasis. Creates a water field that heals allies
Skill: Iron Will—Support skill that applies Iron Hide to nearby allies
Skill: Siege Bubble—Creates a dome that destroys projectiles on impact
Skill: Slam Impact—Launch enemies on the other side of the door
Skill: Toxic Unveiling Shot—Removes stealth and applies poison to targets
Skimmers expend a great deal of energy flying and swimming—Hullgarden's fishing nets keep the juvenile wavehawks happy and healthy!
Skimmers need frequent feedings to stay strong and healthy. Find a fishing net that needs repairs. It's submerged just south of where crabs are made kings.
Skimmers value loyalty. Find and return a package hauled by a wavehawk. The Hullgardeners say one was left near a rock between the sands and the arches.

Skyscales are flying mounts that can take you to previously unreachable areas of the world. To ascend, simply hold [lbracket]%str1%[rbracket] while mounted.
Skyscales have the ability to remain hovering in the air without falling to give you a dragon's-eye view of the landscape and avoid terrestrial threats.
Skywatch Archipelago is the gateway to many realities, but it would be folly to assume this tower was "the" tower.
